goal: Fix remaining visible mojibake-like user-facing strings in src/renderer/src/components/MenuBar.tsx while keeping the change tightly scoped.
constraints: Change only user-facing strings or tiny display glyphs that are visibly malformed or mojibake-like.

Run a relevant local check if practical.
success_criteria: Visible malformed MenuBar.tsx UI strings are corrected.
